description: Golden dataset split for deployed Agent Engine evals (no scoring in this phase).

suites.purpose: Cost correctness, schema checks, ambiguity clarifications, and guardrails
Routing, context carryover, memory clear/idempotency, and specialist delegation checks

notes: Ground truth for numeric checks should be generated from deterministic BigQuery SQL, not model-generated answers.
Use phase0 profile to freeze runtime env before collecting baseline outputs.
Scoring/threshold enforcement is planned for phase2+.
